# hooks-public-set-field-order

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for setFieldOrder

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useSetFieldOrderMutation(); mutate({ input: '<value>' });
```

## Examples

### Use useSetFieldOrderMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useSetFieldOrderMutation();
mutate({ input: '<value>' });
```
